Privacy Policy 


 

 Free Standard shipping for qualifying orders applies to orders shipped to the US only. Taxes and Gift Cards do not count towards the Free Shipping total. Please note, some oversized items may require an additional shipping charge. See our 
https://click.s.urbanoutfitters.com/? 
Shipping  and 
https://click.s.urbanoutfitters.com/? 
Return Policies  for more information.


To qualify for receipt of a 20% off coupon towards your next purchase, you must submit at least five (5) reviews between the first and last date of a calendar quarter (6/1-8/31; 9/1-11/30; 12/1-2/28; 3/1-5/31). The review must be submitted on www.UrbanOutfitters.com (the &ldquo;Website&rdquo;), must include the statement disclosing your participation in the incentive program, and must be related to a product available for purchase on the Website. If you have successfully submitted at least five (5) qualifying reviews within that time period, you will receive one (1) 20% off coupon in the first month of the subsequent calendar quarter, via the email address provided at the time of review submission. Qualifying products for review include all items sold through the Website. All reviews must
 comply with and are subject to the Customer Ratings and Reviews Terms and Conditions, Review Guidelines, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use.
